_schema_notes: Each round has title, optional theme (printed under the round title), and questions.
Questions are free-answer by default (blank line). Include 'choices' for MC (team writes the letter). Use question_type 'TrueFalse' for T/F.
Used by: python -m promptukit.exams.create_pub_quiz -q <this file> -o pub_quiz.pdf
title: JRB Industries Pub Quiz

rounds.title: Motorsport
rounds.theme: Open wheel, closed wheel, and everything in between.

questions.prompt: Which series uses the Dallara IR-18 as its spec chassis?
What year did the first Indianapolis 500 take place?
Which flag color signals that a Formula 1 race has been stopped?
How many laps make up the Indianapolis 500?
Name the driver who won the 2008 Formula 1 World Championship.
True or false: a full-course yellow in IndyCar bunches the field behind the pace car.
Which Beatles album includes the track 'A Day in the Life'?
In what key is Beethoven's 5th Symphony?
Name the lead singer of Queen.
What instrument did Jimi Hendrix famously play left-handed?
Which 1984 Prince album shares its name with a film he starred in?
True or false: Taylor Swift's 'Midnights' was released in 2021.
What is the chemical symbol for gold?
How many bones are in the adult human body?
Which planet has the most moons as of 2024?
What is the square root of 144?
Name the scientist who formulated the three laws of motion.
What is the approximate value of pi to five decimal places?
